message:
🐛 Fix eager card loading to use debounce and proper cancellation (#245)

The existing eager mount mechanism used a one-shot timer that could miss
late-arriving cards and had no per-callback cancellation. Replace with a
debounce-based approach that restarts the drain timer on each new card
registration and uses numeric IDs so individual cards can cancel their
eager mount when IntersectionObserver fires first or the card unmounts.

This ensures all 66+ dashboard cards progressively mount in the background
after visible ones settle, eliminating skeleton flashes on scroll.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
